slides.headline: *3* CRAZY THINGS IN AI *TODAY*
slides.subtitle: The *3 stories* you don't want to miss.

art.bg_prompt: A photorealistic cinematic close-up of a young person staring at a glowing laptop screen with a genuinely shocked, amazed expression: wide eyes, hand near the mouth, face lit by cool blue screen glow in a dark room. Shallow depth of field, dramatic and premium editorial photography, real natural human skin, not cartoon, not uncanny. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.

slides.headline: *$7* AND *22 MINUTES* TO BUILD A GAME
slides.subtitle: Sakana's *Fugu Ultra* went head to head with *Claude Opus 4.8*.
slides.body: From a single prompt, Fugu built a playable Crossy Road clone in *22 minutes* for *$7.32* — rough edges and all. Coding agents are now cheap enough to point at real prototypes, not just demos.

art.bg_prompt_fallback: A cinematic 3D voxel game world at night with glowing light trails, premium render, no text.

slides.headline: *CLAUDE* NOW LIVES IN YOUR *SLACK*
slides.subtitle: Anthropic's *Claude Tag* joins channels as a teammate, with *memory*.
slides.body: Tag it into any channel and it reads context, takes action, and follows up on its own — no re-prompting. The *agent-as-teammate* pattern just went mainstream: assistants that live where work happens, not in a separate tab.

art.bg_prompt: A realistic modern team-chat workspace on a laptop screen at night, a single warm glowing AI presence orb integrated into the conversation, soft orange accent light, cinematic photographic depth of field, no readable text.

slides.headline: *ZUCKERBERG* WANTS A *PREDICTION MARKET*
slides.subtitle: Meta is reportedly building a *prediction markets app*.
slides.body: That puts it in the same arena as *Polymarket* and *Kalshi*. When the biggest platforms chase live, real-time odds, the signal is clear: markets are becoming a data layer worth building on.

art.bg_prompt: Place this real person (keep his face and likeness exactly) center-frame, looking confident, in front of a large glowing prediction-market odds board showing probability percentages and live market candlestick graphs, cool electric-blue trading-floor lighting, cinematic editorial photograph, premium and realistic.

slides.headline: AGENTIC *DROP* NEWS
slides.body: The key things to know in *AI & Tech* everyday.

art.bg_prompt: A clean minimal dark scene of glowing modular building blocks assembling into a connected workflow graph, optimistic premium blue glow, cinematic 3D render, no text.

caption:
Three AI stories from June 23 worth your attention:

1. Sakana's Fugu Ultra built a playable game in 22 minutes for 7 dollars, head to head with Claude Opus 4.8.
2. Claude Tag landed in Slack as a real teammate with persistent memory.
3. Meta is reportedly building a prediction markets app.

The through-line: AI is getting cheaper, more proactive, and pointed at real-time data.

Follow for tomorrow's drop.
